name: Sugar Cookies # 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, nutmeg, and salt into a bowl.
4. Mix in the sour milk alternately with the dry ingredients.
5. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Drop the dough by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a hot oven (430°F) for 10-12 minutes.
